title: pelargonium × orchideum
intro: Pelargonium × orchideum, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Pelargonium genus. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of geraniol and linalool. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include relief from stress and anxiety, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and promote better sleep. Rose Geranium can be prepared as an herbal tea, essential oil, or infused in water as a natural remedy for various health concerns.
